phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla para comprar entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh es-TAH la tah-KEE-yah pa-rah kom-PRAR en-TRAH-das?

likely_response.local: En la entrada principal, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance, on the left.

responses.english: At the main entrance, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la entrada principal, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide pickup is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde recojo la audioguía disponible aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-de re-KO-ho la ow-dee-o-GEE-a dee-po-NEE-bla a-KEE?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, muestra tu entrada primero.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah moo-EH-strah TOO ehnt-RAH-dah pree-MEH-roh
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, show your ticket first.

responses.english: At the ticket office, show your ticket first.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah moo-EH-strah TOO ehnt-RAH-dah pree-MEH-roh
responses.french: En la taquilla, muestra tu entrada primero.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the accessibility entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuál es la entrada accesible para sillas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KWAH-el es lah en-TRAH-dah ahk-seh-SEE-bleh pah-rah SEE-yahs?

likely_response.local: Puerta de León, acceso prioritario disponible allí.
likely_response.pronunciation: poo-EHR-tah DEH leh-ÓN ahth-THEH-soh pree-oh-ree-tah-REE-oh dee-spoh-NEEB-leh ahl-LÍ
likely_response.translation_en: Lion Gate, priority access available there.

responses.english: Lion Gate, priority access available there.
responses.phonetic: poo-EHR-tah DEH leh-ÓN ahth-THEH-soh pree-oh-ree-tah-REE-oh dee-spoh-NEEB-leh ahl-LÍ
responses.french: Puerta de León, acceso prioritario disponible allí.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the security screening area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el control de seguridad antes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el kohn-TROHL deh seh-goo-ree-DAHD an-TEHS?

likely_response.local: Justo antes de entrar, siga las colas.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOO-stoh AHN-tehs DEH ehnt-RAHR SEE-gah LAHS KOH-lahs
likely_response.translation_en: Just before entering, follow the queues.

responses.english: Just before entering, follow the queues.
responses.phonetic: HOO-stoh AHN-tehs DEH ehnt-RAHR SEE-gah LAHS KOH-lahs
responses.french: Justo antes de entrar, siga las colas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Game of Thrones filming garden is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde están los jardines donde filmaron Juego de Tronos?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs hahr-DEE-nehs DOHN-deh feel-MAH-rohn HWEH-goh deh Troh-nohs?

likely_response.local: Al Patio de las Doncellas, crucen el Salón
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LAHS dohn-THEHL-lahs KROO-thehn EHL sah-LÓN
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go straight towards royal gardens.

responses.english: Good morning, go straight towards royal gardens.
responses.phonetic: AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LAHS dohn-THEHL-lahs KROO-thehn EHL sah-LÓN
responses.french: Al Patio de las Doncellas, crucen el Salón
